text: لاَ يَسْتَوِي‌ أَصْحَابُ‌ النَّارِ وَ أَصْحَابُ‌ الْجَنَّةِ أَصْحَابُ‌ الْجَنَّةِ هُمُ‌ الْفَائِزُونَ‌

en.ahmedali: Alike are not the inmates of Hell and the residents of Paradise. The men of Paradise will be felicitous.
en.ahmedraza: The People of hell and the People of Paradise are not equal; it is only the People of Paradise who have succeeded.
en.arberry: Not equal are the inhabitants of the Fire and the inhabitants of Paradise. The inhabitants of Paradise -- they are the triumphant.
en.daryabadi: Not equal are the fellows of the Fire and the fellows of the Garden. Fellows of the Garden! they are the achievers!
en.hilali: Not equal are the dwellers of the Fire and the dwellers of the Paradise. It is the dwellers of Paradise that will be successful.
en.itani: Not equal are the inhabitants of the Fire and the inhabitants of Paradise. It is the inhabitants of Paradise who are the winners.
en.maududi: Those destined for the Fire and those destined for Paradise cannot be alike. Verily it is those destined for Paradise who shall triumph.
en.mubarakpuri: Not equal are the dwellers of the Fire and the dwellers of the Paradise. It is the dwellers of Paradise that will be successful.
en.pickthall: Not equal are the owners of the Fire and the owners of the Garden. The owners of the Garden, they are the victorious.
en.qarai: Not equal are the inmates of the Fire and the inhabitants of paradise. It is the inhabitants of paradise who are the successful ones.
en.qaribullah: The inhabitants of the Fire and the inhabitants of Paradise are not equal. The inhabitants of Paradise shall be triumphant.
en.sahih: Not equal are the companions of the Fire and the companions of Paradise. The companions of Paradise - they are the attainers [of success].
en.sarwar: The Companions of the Fire and the Companions of the Garden are not equal. The Companions of the Garden will achieve felicity.
en.shakir: Not alike are the inmates of the fire and the dwellers of the garden: the dwellers of the garden are they that are the achievers.
en.transliteration: La yastawee ashabu alnnari waashabu aljannati ashabu aljannati humu alfaizoona
en.wahiduddin: The people of the Fire and the people of Paradise are not equal. The people of Paradise are the victorious ones.
en.yusufali: Not equal are the Companions of the Fire and the Companions of the Garden: it is the Companions of the Garden, that will achieve Felicity.
fa.ansarian: دوزخیان و بهشتیان یکسان نیستند، بهشتیان همان رستگارانند.
fa.ayati: اهل آتش و اهل بهشت با هم برابر نيستند. اهل بهشت خود كاميافتگانند.
fa.bahrampour: دوزخيان با بهشتيان يكسان نيستند، بهشتيانند كه كاميابند
fa.fooladvand: دوزخيان با بهشتيان يكسان نيستند؛ بهشتيانند كه كاميابانند.
fa.ghomshei: هرگز اهل جهنم و اهل بهشت با هم یکسان نیستند، اهل بهشت به حقیقت سعادتمندان عالمند.
fa.khorramdel: بهشتیان و دوزخیان یکسان و برابر نیستند. بهشتیان (به همه‌ی آرزوهای خود رسیده‌اند و) رستگار و پیروزند. [[«هُمُ الْفَآئِزُونَ»: (نگا: توبه / 20، مؤمنون / 111، نور / 52)]]
fa.khorramshahi: دوزخیان و بهشتیان برابر نیستند، بهشتیانند که رستگارند
fa.makarem: هرگز دوزخیان و بهشتیان یکسان نیستند؛ اصحاب بهشت رستگار و پیروزند!
fa.moezzi: یکسان نیستند یاران آتش و یاران بهشت یاران بهشتند رستگاران‌
fa.mojtabavi: دوزخيان و بهشتيان برابر نيستند بهشتيان همان رستگارانند.
fa.sadeqi: دوزخیان با بهشتیان یکسان نیستند. بهشتیان همان کامیابانند.
